grill_cold.text: The grill. Cold grates. No charcoal yet. String lights droop, waiting for dusk.

grill_supplies.text: Charcoal bag on the patio. Lighter fluid next to it. Grill itself still cold. Time to build the pyramid.

grill_prepped.text: Coals glowing white around the edges. Grill ready. Burgers in the fridge, waiting for their moment.

grill_cooking.text: Burgers on the grates. Grease flare. You should probably be watching these.

grill_done.text: Perfect char. Pink centers. You are a craftsman. The platter looks professional.

grill_burnt.text: Hockey pucks. The smoke alarm inside has given up. Karen's silence is deafening.
